title: 21. RAG Context
description: Build and test local retrieval context for chat using selected text or PDF files.

steps.title: Open RAG Context
steps.body: RAG Context lives under Host settings. It can inject retrieved file snippets into chat, but only after you choose files and build the local index.

steps.title: Enable Retrieval
steps.body: Enable RAG only when you want document context in chat. Leave it off for ordinary conversation so unrelated files do not influence the assistant.

steps.title: Choose Source Files
steps.body: Add Files selects the documents that may be searched. Keep the set focused; a small relevant index is easier to trust than a huge mixed one.

steps.title: Tune Retrieval Limits
steps.body: Top K, minimum score, and max characters control how much retrieved context enters the prompt. Smaller limits reduce noise and token use.

steps.title: Build and Reload the Index
steps.body: Build Index scans the selected files. Reload is useful after restarting the app or changing files on disk.

steps.title: Test Before Using in Chat
steps.body: Use the test query and result preview to check what snippets would be injected. If the preview is irrelevant, tighten files, score, or query before starting a real chat.
